sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112064" key="fonofo/nths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φονο-φόντης</orth> <sense id="n112064.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">φονεύς</ref></xr>, only in compds., e.g. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ἀργει-, βροτο-φόντης,</foreign> etc.</sense> </entryFree>
